sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: GSK Buyout Turns Volatile RAPT Into Food Allergy Cash-Out Story
feed.summary: GSK has announced its acquisition of RAPT Therapeutics, focusing on the anti-IgE antibody ozureprubart for food allergy prophylaxis. The transaction, valued at approximately $2.2 billion, is expected to close in Q1 2026, shifting investor focus to deal completion and regulatory approvals.
